zh.Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪
zh.Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, F: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪
zh.lifeSummary: Arnould II De Renty是Gilbert De Renty和Louise de Tingry的兒子，於大約1160年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪。他於大約1188年與Blanche de Berghes-st-Winnoc結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1228年享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Arnould II De Renty是Gilbert De Renty和Louise de Tingry的儿子，于大约1160年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪。他于大约1188年与Blanche de Berghes-st-Winnoc结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1228年享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Renty
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Renz   and, in North America, its altered form.

variants.name: Renslow
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of German Renzle, from a pet form of Rentz .

variants.name: Rentzel
meanings: German:
habitational name from Renzel in Hanover.
from a pet form of the personal name   Rentz  .

variants.name: Renze
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Rafael, Josefina, Mercedes.
North German: archaic form of Rentz 1 (from Lorenz).

variants.name: Renz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Erwin, Horst, Fritz, Hans, Kurt.
German: from the personal name Renz, a short form of Reinhard (see Reinhardt ) or Lorenz (see Lawrence ).
German: habitational name from any of several places called Renz or Rentz in Pomerania and the former East Prussia.

nameMeanings.name: Arnould
meanings: Saxon, Latin: Faithful to his honour; help in war, helping lord; powerful lord.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: Arnould II De Renty was born about 1160, in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France as the son of Gilbert De Renty and Louise de Tingry. He married Blanche de Berghes-st-Winnoc about 1188. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1228, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Arnould II De Renty est né environ 1160, à Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, fils de Gilbert De Renty et Louise de Tingry. Il a épousé Blanche de Berghes-st-Winnoc environ 1188. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1228, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Arnould II De Renty wurde um 1160 in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich, als Sohn von Gilbert De Renty und Louise de Tingry geboren. Er hat um 1188 Blanche de Berghes-st-Winnoc geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1228 im Alter von 69 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Arnould II De Renty è nato il circa 1160 nel Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia come figlio di Gilbert De Renty e Louise de Tingry. Lui sposato Blanche de Berghes-st-Winnoc circa 1188. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1228, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Arnould II De Rentyは約1160年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスレントイでGilbert De RentyとLouise de Tingryの息子として生まれた。約1188年にBlanche de Berghes-st-Winnocと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1228年に69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Arnould II De Renty(은)는 대략 1160년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 렌티에서 Gilbert De Renty(와)과 Louise de Tingry의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1188년 Blanche de Berghes-st-Winnoc(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1228년 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Arnould II De Renty nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França filho de Gilbert De Renty e Louise de Tingry. Ele casou-se com Blanche de Berghes-st-Winnoc aproximadamente 1188. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1228, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Arnould II De Renty родился около 1160 г. в местности ренти, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. Его родителей звали Gilbert De Renty и Louise de Tingry. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanche de Berghes-st-Winnoc около 1188 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1228 г. в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Arnould II De Renty nació aproximadamente 1160, en Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia como hijo de Gilbert De Renty y Louise de Tingry. Se casó con Blanche de Berghes-st-Winnoc aproximadamente 1188. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1228, a la edad de 69 años.
